Digital Mirror of yourConstruction Site
Autonomous Execution Layer
Beyond Tracking:
Meet Your Digital Workforce

Traditional software waits for you to tell it what happened. Intellibyld’s Agentic AI acts on its own to make sure your project stays on track. By unifying your BIM models, ERP data, and supplier communications into a single Autonomous Execution Layer, we’ve moved beyond simple dashboards to a system that proactively manages the heavy lifting of construction logistics.

  • Autonomous Logistics: Freeing teams for site execution.
  • Proactive Neutralization: Stopping threats early.
  • Zero Friction: Fast-tracking RFQs and shipments.
Learn more
Autonomous Execution Layer
Beyond Tracking:
Meet Your Digital Workforce

Traditional software waits for you to tell it what happened. Intellibyld’s Agentic AI acts on its own to make sure your project stays on track. By unifying your BIM models, ERP data, and supplier communications into a single Autonomous Execution Layer, we’ve moved beyond simple dashboards to a system that proactively manages the heavy lifting of construction logistics.

  • Autonomous Logistics: Freeing teams for site execution.
  • Proactive Neutralization: Stopping threats early.
  • Zero Friction: Fast-tracking RFQs and shipments.
Learn more
Real-Time Visibility
Why Choose Intellibyld
Digital Twins

Live Material Tracking

Every material shipment is mirrored in a live digital twin, giving you a real-time map of your entire supply chain.

01

Site-Level Visualisation

See exactly what's on-site, in-transit, and at-risk through an interactive 3D twin of your construction project.

02

Scenario Simulation

Run what-if analyses on your twin — test alternative suppliers, delivery routes, or schedule changes before committing.

03

BIM Integration

Seamlessly sync your digital twin with BIM models so material data and design data live in one unified view.

04

Anomaly Detection

The twin continuously compares planned vs. actual progress, flagging deviations before they become costly delays.

05

Historical Replay

Replay past project timelines to identify patterns, improve future estimates, and train your team on best practices.

06
What We Provide
A Live Virtual Mirror
Of Your Entire
Supply Chain

Track every material from factory to site in real time.
Spot threats and simulate alternatives before they hit your schedule.

Real-Time Supply Map
3D Site Visualisation
What-If Simulations
BIM Sync
Deviation Alerts
Project Replay
